option.name: originalContent
option.value:
package ui.features.root
import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable import org.jetbrains.jewel.ui.icon.IconKey
enum class PageSection { TOP, BOTTOM }
data class Page( val title: String, val config: RootComponent.Config, val iconKey: IconKey, val section: PageSection, val content: @Composable (child: RootComponent.Child) -> Unit )

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
